name: Godswill Okoyomon
detected_gaps: Inconsistent AI prospecting and lead source coverage
Slow response time without an instant AI responder
No clear AI booking or conversion path
recommended_fixes: Deploy an AI prospecting agent to reduce dependence on one lead source.
Deploy an instant AI response agent so new leads hear back in under 60 seconds.
Install an AI lead capture agent so every inquiry is logged, tagged, and routed instantly.
Install an AI follow-up agent that keeps leads moving after the first inquiry.
Deploy an AI booking and conversion agent to move qualified leads into calls or sales.
